info.title: Vocation API
info.description: Job matching and application management platform. Features authentication, user profiles, job discovery with personalized matching, application tracking, dashboards, and employer tools.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: User registration, login, and session management

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: User profile management (resume data, work style, career preferences, portfolio links)

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Job search, filtering, and personalized discovery

tags.name: Applications
tags.description: Application lifecycle management for job seekers

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Keyword search across title, company, description, skills

200.description: Paginated job list with match scores

get.summary: Top N matched jobs for user

200.description: Recommended jobs sorted by match score

get.summary: All jobs sorted by match score

200.description: All jobs sorted by match score descending

jobId.description: Must be a valid, active job
